evals.name: travel-event
evals.prompt: /alfred 29/03 đi đám cưới bạn ở Đồng Nai, khởi hành 7h sáng
evals.expected_output: Full day schedule with: travel event added, ăn sáng moved earlier, đón vợ flagged as conflict, prep task on 28/03, no deep work, INTJ recovery buffer, science notes explaining why

assertions.name: reads_gcal
assertions.description: Called gcal_list_events to read existing schedule

assertions.name: proposal_format
assertions.description: Output contains the proposal format with calendar changes section

assertions.name: travel_day_no_deep_work
assertions.description: Recognizes travel day = no deep work
assertions.pattern: no deep work|không deep work|travel day

assertions.name: no_execution_before_approval
assertions.description: Does NOT call gcal_create_event or gcal_update_event before approval

evals.name: early-wake
evals.prompt: /alfred ngày mai vợ đi làm 5h sáng
evals.expected_output: Schedule with 4:30 wake, compressed day, conservative mode warning, cold brew window noted, bed anchored to 21:00 sleep gate, max 1-2 deep blocks

assertions.name: early_wake_warning
assertions.description: Warns about early wake / sleep debt

assertions.name: cold_brew_timing
assertions.description: Mentions cold brew first sip timing adjusted

evals.name: optimize-day
evals.expected_output: Reads existing schedule + tasks, maps tasks to energy windows, suggests reading slot, shows full optimized schedule with science reasoning, materializes via Todoist dueString times and [alfred] calendar blocks

assertions.name: energy_mapping
assertions.description: Maps tasks to energy windows via labels

assertions.name: materialization
assertions.description: Shows materialization via Todoist time or [alfred] calendar blocks

evals.name: add-quest-today
evals.expected_output: Classifies as Main/Income with high_energy label, creates Todoist task, updates task with timed dueString for today, places in peak energy window, shows both Todoist + Calendar changes

assertions.name: creates_todoist
assertions.description: Called add-tasks to create the Todoist task

assertions.name: reads_gcal_for_placement
assertions.description: Called gcal_list_events to find optimal time slot

assertions.name: sets_timed_duestring
assertions.description: Called update-tasks to set timed dueString for materialization

assertions.name: peak_window_placement
assertions.description: Places task in peak energy window

assertions.name: shows_materialization
assertions.description: Shows both Todoist creation and calendar materialization

evals.name: re-optimize-existing
evals.prompt: /alfred optimize tomorrow (assume [alfred] blocks and timed Todoist tasks already exist from a previous optimize run)
evals.expected_output: Identifies existing [alfred] blocks, proposes updates (MOVE) not delete+recreate, updates Todoist dueString times

evals.name: quest-future-date
evals.prompt: /alfred thêm task review CCNA material, due next week
evals.expected_output: Classifies as Main/Growth with high_energy label, creates Todoist task with due date next week, does NOT set timed dueString, no calendar materialization

assertions.name: creates_todoist
assertions.description: Called add-tasks to create the Todoist task

assertions.name: future_due_date
assertions.description: Sets due date to next week

assertions.name: no_time_placement
assertions.description: Does not materialize to calendar (future date)

assertions.name: no_gcal_create
assertions.description: Does NOT call gcal_create_event for future-dated tasks
